title: Namakkal Fort
tagline: Namakkal Fort — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Namakkal Fort is a historic fort present in Namakkal in Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Namakkal Fort is a historic fort present in Namakkal in Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The fort was built during the reign of Thirumalai Nayak of Madurai in 17th century. It was under the dominion of Tipu Sultan and then switched hands to the British East India Company as a part of Srirangapattinam treaty. The fort was used as a watch tower and garrison by the ruling empire.

topPlaces.name: Namakkal block
topPlaces.description: Namakkal block is a revenue block in the Namakkal district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 34 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Nettayampalayam
topPlaces.description: Nettayampalayam is a village in Paramathi-velur Taluk Namakkal district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village consists of mainly irrigated fields.

topPlaces.name: Namakkal taluk
topPlaces.description: Namakkal taluk is a taluk of Namakkal district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Namakkal.

topPlaces.name: Namakkal division
topPlaces.description: Namakkal division is a revenue division in the Namakkal district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Narasimhaswamy Temple, Namakkal
topPlaces.description: The Narasimhaswamy temple is a temple located in Namakkal, a town in the Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the Hindu god Narasimha, considered an avatar of Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Sri Ranganatha Perumal temple, Namakkal
topPlaces.description: The Ranganathaswami temple in Namakkal, a town in Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. The temple is one of the 108 Purana Kshethrams of Vaishnavate tradition.

topPlaces.name: Namakkal Anjaneyar Temple
topPlaces.description: Namakkal Anjaneyar temple is located in Namakkal, a town in Namakkal district in Tamil Nadu, India and is dedicated to the Hindu god Hanuman. It is constructed in the Tamil style of architecture.

topPlaces.name: Namakkal
topPlaces.description: Namakkal (Tamil: [nɑːməkkəl]) is a city and the headquarters of Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu. It is the first ISO 14001-2004 certified municipality in Asia for environmental management, specifically the provision and maintenance of water supply, solid waste and sewage management, town planning, lighting and other social services.

items.note: Namakkal block is a revenue block in the Namakkal district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 34 panchayat villages.
Nettayampalayam is a village in Paramathi-velur Taluk Namakkal district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village consists of mainly irrigated fields.
Namakkal taluk is a taluk of Namakkal district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Namakkal.
Namakkal division is a revenue division in the Namakkal district of Tamil Nadu, India.

The Narasimhaswamy temple is a temple located in Namakkal, a town in the Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is dedicated to the Hindu god Narasimha, considered an avatar of Vishnu.

The Ranganathaswami temple in Namakkal, a town in Namakkal district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. The temple is one of the 108 Purana Kshethrams of Vaishnavate tradition.
Namakkal Anjaneyar temple is located in Namakkal, a town in Namakkal district in Tamil Nadu, India and is dedicated to the Hindu god Hanuman. It is constructed in the Tamil style of architecture.

Namakkal (Tamil: [nɑːməkkəl]) is a city and the headquarters of Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu. It is the first ISO 14001-2004 certified municipality in Asia for environmental management, specifically the provision and maintenance of water supply, solid waste and sewage management, town planning, lighting and other social services.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Namakkal Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Namakkal Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Namakkal Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (79 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (75 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Namakkal Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Namakkal Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Namakkal Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Namakkal Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Namakkal Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Namakkal block, Nettayampalayam, Namakkal taluk, Namakkal division, Narasimhaswamy Temple, Namakkal.
